summary: P0 IAM Rework Features Verified: SearchableSelect dropdowns, Team-Specialty relationships, and User account email alerts all working correctly. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/users/identity-config returns roles and account_types for dropdowns
Backend: GET /api/teams returns teams with related_specialty_ids and related_specialty_names
Backend: PATCH /api/teams/{id} can update related_specialty_ids
Backend: GET /api/specialties returns specialties with id, name, color for dropdown
Backend: GET /api/subscription-plans returns plans for dropdown
Backend: POST /api/users with send_welcome_email flag works
Backend: POST /api/users with Partner account type requires subscription_plan_id
Backend: POST /api/users with Partner and subscription_plan_id works
Backend: PATCH /api/users/{id} with active=false/true triggers email notifications
Backend: POST /api/teams with related_specialty_ids works
Frontend: Add User dialog opens with temp password pre-generated
Frontend: Password field has show/hide toggle and regenerate button
Frontend: Role dropdown is SearchableSelect with search input
Frontend: Account Type dropdown is SearchableSelect with search input
Frontend: Team dropdown is SearchableSelect with search input
Frontend: Specialty dropdown is SearchableSelect with search input and filtering
Frontend: Partner account type shows Subscription Plan dropdown (purple section)
Frontend: Team edit dialog has Related Specialties multi-select
Frontend: Related Specialties multi-select has search input
Frontend: Send welcome email toggle is ON by default for new users
critical_code_review_comments: SearchableSelect component correctly implements Popover with search input
SearchableMultiSelect component shows selected items as badges with remove buttons
generatePassword() function creates 12-char random password with special chars
Team model correctly includes related_specialty_ids and related_specialty_names
User creation with send_welcome_email flag triggers send_account_created_email
getFilteredSpecialties() correctly filters specialties based on team's related_specialty_ids
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 IAM Rework features verified. Add User dialog now has: 1) Temp password field with show/hide toggle and regenerate button, 2) All dropdowns are SearchableSelect components with search input, 3) Partner account type shows Subscription Plan dropdown in purple section, 4) Send welcome email toggle ON by default. Team edit dialog has Related Specialties multi-select. When team has related_specialty_ids, user specialty dropdown filters to those specialties. Email alerts: account creation sends welcome email with temp password, disable/reactivate sends notification emails. SMTP is LIVE (Gmail configured).

searchable_role_dropdown.description: Role dropdown is SearchableSelect with search input, shows Administrator/Operator/Standard User

searchable_account_type_dropdown.description: Account Type dropdown is SearchableSelect with search input, shows Partner/Media Client/Internal Staff/Vendor/Freelancer

searchable_team_dropdown.description: Team dropdown is SearchableSelect with search input, shows all teams

searchable_specialty_dropdown.description: Specialty dropdown is SearchableSelect with search input and filtering

searchable_subscription_plan_dropdown.description: Subscription Plan dropdown appears when Partner account type selected (purple section)

team_related_specialties_multiselect.description: Team edit dialog has SearchableMultiSelect for related specialties

team_specialty_badges.description: Team cards show related specialty names as badges

temp_password_generation.description: New user creation generates random 12-char temp password with show/hide toggle and regenerate button

welcome_email_toggle.description: Send welcome email toggle ON by default for new users

account_email_alerts.description: Account creation/disable/reactivate sends email notifications (SMTP LIVE)

specialty_filtering_by_team.description: When team with related_specialty_ids is selected, specialty dropdown filters to those specialties

mocked_apis.note: SMTP is LIVE (Gmail configured) - emails are actually sent
